MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Lem/Ray Properties is present. Represented by Joe Vargo.
Attorney, Edward Singer , appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Rob Jones, is present.
Attorney, Dan Goldstein, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Nancy Huddgins, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of AUG-16-2010 is vacated.
